heading: Data Access Types
body:
When you create a federated database instance, you grant Atlas one of the following types of
data access to the AWS (Amazon Web Services) buckets in your AWS (Amazon Web Services) account.

- **read only access:** It cannot make any changes to the data or add new data.

- **read and write access:** It can update existing files, delete files, or
  add new data to the storage.

To access your Atlas clusters, Atlas uses your existing
[Role Based Access Controls](manual/core/authorization). You can view
and edit the acces of your user following the steps in
[Manage Users and Roles on Self-Managed Deployments](manual/tutorial/manage-users-and-roles).
